column1: # warm-cache-prompts.tsv — Tool calls for warming caches and smoke-testing
# Lines starting with # are comments; blank lines are ignored.
# Derived from the 10 example prompts in docs/example-prompts.md.
# Calls are ordered: FTS/semantic searches first (warm SQLite FTS + mmap page
# cache), then browse/resolve (warm notation lookup cache), then expand_keys
# and search_prefix (warm key variant + prefix queries).
# Prompt 1: Smell and the Senses in Art
# Prompt 4: The Life and Miracles of St. Francis
# Prompt 7: From Notation to Artwork (cross-server handoff)
# Prompt 8: Last Supper or Wedding at Cana?
# Prompt 9: A Broken Lute String as Vanitas
# Extra: exercise new parameters and edge cases
# browse depth=3 on a narrow branch
# multi-word FTS fallback (phrase match should fail, AND fallback should work)
